zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Clifford於1401年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福時，她的父親James de  Clifford35歲，母親Margaret Hedley34歲。她於大約1416年與Sir Reynold de Gyse在英國格盧斯特斯爾艾爾莫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1466年4月13日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾可利享年65歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Clifford于1401年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福时，她的父亲James de  Clifford35岁，母亲Margaret Hedley34岁。她于大约1416年与Sir Reynold de Gyse在英国格盧斯特斯爾艾爾莫结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1466年4月13日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾可利享年65岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利。

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Clifford was born in 1401, in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England, her father, James de  Clifford, was 35 and her mother, Margaret Hedley, was 34. She married Sir Reynold de Gyse about 1416, in Elmore, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 13 April 1466, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Clifford est née en 1401, à Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, James de  Clifford, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hedley, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Reynold de Gyse environ 1416, à Elmore, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 avril 1466, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

ko.Frampton, Gloucester, England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터
ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Clifford(이)가 1401년 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴  세버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James de  Clifford(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Hedley(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1416년 영국 그루스스터실르 엘모어에서 Sir Reynold de Gyse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 4월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Reynold de Gyse aproximadamente 1416, em Elmore, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.Frampton, Gloucester, England: фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Clifford родилась в 1401 г. в местности фрамптон он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени James de  Clifford было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hedley, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Reynold de Gyse около 1416 г. в местности элмор, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 апреля 1466 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия.
